title: The Crucible
summary: Trapped on Eriadu with the Empire closing in, the heroes fight their way out of the lower sumps and off-world. As they reach the rendezvous coordinates, the Resurgence drops out of hyperspace — and a Star Destroyer follows. Draco intercepts Denia's escape pod. The heroes watch the Resurgence die, TIE fighters swarming the survivors, and are forced to jump to hyperspace with nothing.

gearNotes.reason: Personal trials and reckoning imply combat and consequences. Medical supplies are always non-negotiable.
If alliances are being tested, secure communications between party members and allies become critical. Trust is the theme — intercepted comms could shatter it.
If alliances are being tested, recording conversations as evidence or insurance could be the difference between proving loyalty and being framed.
Personal trials may involve deception, infiltration, or hiding identity. Context-dependent on the specific trials.
The Reckoning implies a climactic confrontation. Combat recovery between scenes.
